name: Bomber
short_description: Bomber is a fun arcade puzzle game for kids and families. Blast walls, find hidden keys, collect power-ups, and complete 20 exciting levels full of surprises.
detailed_description:
Bomber is a lighthearted arcade puzzle game designed for kids and families. Your goal is simple: use bombs to blast through walls, find hidden keys, and reach the exit door to complete each level.

🎮 How to Play

  • Place bombs to destroy walls and clear the path

  • Search for the hidden key to unlock the exit

  • Collect fun power-ups that give you extra abilities

⭐ Power-Ups

  • Bomb Range – increase the blast range of your bombs

  • Multiple Bombs – place more than one bomb at a time

  • Speed Boost – move faster through the maze

  • Extra Life – gain another chance if you get caught

  • Shield – stay protected for a short time

🌟 Game Features

  • 20 fun and challenging levels

  • Colorful, kid-friendly graphics

  • Simple controls with keyboard or joystick

  • Fast, easy-to-learn gameplay — perfect for quick fun sessions

Bomber is the perfect time-killer game for kids and families who enjoy puzzles, arcade action, and simple fun.
